chest.name: Quantum Chest
chest.description: One of a pair. Always shares its inventory with its entangled partner, no matter where either is placed. Warning: if its partner ever ceases to exist, this chest and everything inside it vanish too.
bigchest.name: Large Quantum Chest
bigchest.description: A higher-capacity quantum chest. One of a pair. Always shares its inventory with its entangled partner, no matter where either is placed. Warning: if its partner ever ceases to exist, this chest and everything inside it vanish too.
collapse.message: A quantum chest lost its entangled partner and collapsed out of existence, taking its contents with it.
